rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks within component type or implementation scopes as appropriate for the contract's level of detail and scope.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model when generating AGREE annex content.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annexes at valid component type or implementation scopes.
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers or data types not present in the analyzed AADL model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation-level bindings should be placed in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes unless they are valid variables or outputs.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or data types not present in the analyzed AADL model.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE annex placement in component types
